attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT STG_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT,
 (
 select TRANSACTION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME  from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT
 minus
 select TRANSACTION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME  from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTI
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.TRANSACTION_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT.TRANSACTION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACT.REFRESH_DATETIME
